qr.tip: Scan the QR code with your camera or the Ham app

invalid.title: Invalid request
invalid.description: Required authorization parameters are missing. Please go back to the third-party app and try again.

deepLink.title: Ham app not detected
deepLink.description: The app may not be installed. Install the Ham app first and try again, or continue authorizing in this browser with a passkey.
deepLink.downloadAppStore: Get it on the App Store

trying.title: Continuing in Ham
trying.description: Trying to open the Ham app, please wait…

login.title: Sign in to Ham to continue
login.subtitle: You need to sign in before authorizing

qr.tip: Scan the QR code with the Ham app
qr.createFailed: Failed to create QR code, please retry later

passkey.description: Use the passkey you already registered in the Ham app to sign in without scanning.
passkey.unsupported: This browser does not support passkeys. Please use the QR code instead.
passkey.hint: No passkey yet? Sign in with the QR code first, then create one inside the Ham app.

consent.scopeHeader: The app will receive the following permissions:
